user_query: Where did Caroline move from 4 years ago?
full_query: READ(/Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Caroline")]/Session[atom(content =~ "moving relocation")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "moved from") or atom(content =~ "4 years ago")])
xpath_query: /Root/Conversation_Version[1]/Speaker[atom(content =~ "Caroline")]/Session[atom(content =~ "moving relocation")]/Observation[atom(content =~ "moved from") or atom(content =~ "4 years ago")]
